hooks.command: echo "[EVOLUTION BOOT] Session started at $(date -u +%%Y-%%m-%%dT%%H:%%M:%%SZ). Learned rules: $(wc -l < "%CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR%/.claude/memory/learned-rules.md" 2>/dev/null || echo 0) lines. Corrections logged: $(wc -l < "%CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR%/.claude/memory/corrections.jsonl" 2>/dev/null || echo 0). Observations logged: $(wc -l < "%CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR%/.claude/memory/observations.jsonl" 2>/dev/null || echo 0). Sessions: $(wc -l < "%CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR%/.claude/memory/sessions.jsonl" 2>/dev/null || echo 0). READ .claude/memory/learned-rules.md BEFORE STARTING WORK. RUN VERIFICATION SWEEP ON ALL RULES WITH verify: LINES."
echo "[EVOLUTION REMINDER] Before editing: check if this file has path-scoped rules in .claude/rules/. Check learned-rules.md for relevant patterns."
echo "[EVOLUTION CHECKPOINT] Session ending. If corrections were received or observations made, ensure they are logged to .claude/memory/. Write session scorecard to sessions.jsonl."
